name: componentry-particle-typography
title: Particle Typography
author: Harsh Jadhav
description: Samples caller text into a canvas particle field that disperses around pointer or touch input.

changes: Repointed the utility import; fixed zero-distance physics and listener cleanup; added pointer parity, accessible naming, particle and DPR caps, visibility pausing, and an origin-aligned reduced-motion frame.

modifications.change: Repointed the utility import; fixed zero-distance physics and listener cleanup; added pointer parity, accessible naming, particle and DPR caps, visibility pausing, and an origin-aligned reduced-motion frame.
modifications.reason: Keep the interactive sampled typography usable on touch and bounded on dense or high-DPR displays.
